# AdaptiveOps

> AdaptiveOps helps industrial organizations improve operational performance through practical training, operational coaching, and integrated digital management systems. Built from 20+ years of hands-on experience in automotive manufacturing.

## What is ECO?

ECO stands for Execution & Control of Operations. It is an integrated digital platform that connects six management systems into one unified operational core:

- **QMS** — Quality Management System (ISO 9001): Document control, CAPA, audit management, nonconformance, supplier quality, risk & FMEA
- **EMS** — Equipment Management System (ISO 55000): Asset registry, work orders, preventive maintenance, calibration, spare parts, condition monitoring
- **MMS** — Material Management System (DDMRP): Material master, Kanban, traceability, BOM management, WIP & flow control
- **PMS** — People Management System (ISO 45001): Training & competence, performance evaluation, org structure, workplace safety
- **OMS** — Operations Management System (TPS/Lean): Daily management, KPI cascading, production planning, OEE tracking (coming soon)
- **CIS** — Continuous Improvement System (Toyota Kata): Kaizen management, A3 problem solving, improvement projects (coming soon)

## Who is it for?

- Manufacturing companies (automotive, industrial, discrete manufacturing)
- Organizations implementing lean, ISO, or operational excellence programs
- Companies with 50–5000 employees seeking integrated management systems
- European market focus, with plans for global expansion

## Key Differentiators

- Built from real factory experience, not theory
- Integrates training + coaching + digital tools (most vendors offer only one)
- Modular: start with one system, add more as you grow
- Tier 1 (core) and Tier 2 (advanced) modules in each system
- Shared infrastructure: workflow engine, audit trail, reporting, API integration
- On-premise and cloud deployment options

## Services

- **Training Programs** (T1–T8): Lean Manufacturing, Problem Solving, Daily Management, OEE, Quality, Leadership, Toyota Kata, Train the Trainer
- **Coaching Programs** (C1–C5): Kata Coaching, Leadership Coaching, Operational Excellence Coaching, Team Coaching, Executive Coaching

## Target Market

- Primary: Europe (Romania, Germany, Central & Eastern Europe)
- Industries: Automotive, Manufacturing, Industrial
- Company size: SME to Fortune 500
